# Alexi — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A kitesurfing-focused business with an adventurous, outdoor spirit centered around water sports. The brand likely evokes energy, freedom, and the thrill of riding wind and waves.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Fuel your outdoor spirit with Alexi&#39;s kitesurfing adventures and white river kayaking thrills. Dive into the ultimate water sports experience and chase the rush today.

### Lessons & Trips
https://example.com/lessons-trips
Unlock your potential with expert-led kitesurfing and white river kayaking lessons. Book your trip now and turn wild water into your personal playground with Alexi.

### About Alexi
https://example.com/about
Discover the passion of Alexi Cheyenne Figueroa and the relentless drive to share white river kayaking and kitesurfing freedom. Get inspired by our story and join the adventure.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to ride? Reach out to Alexi and kickstart your kitesurfing or white river kayaking escape. Your next adrenaline-packed adventure is just a message away.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Alexi
A kitesurfing-focused business with an adventurous, outdoor spirit centered around water sports. The brand likely evokes energy, freedom, and the thrill of riding wind and waves.

## Target Audience
- Adventure-Seeking Young Professionals
- Eco-Conscious Travelers
- Water Sports Enthusiasts

## Industry
Water Sports / Outdoor Adventure

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
